_comment: Reference copy of the base Caddy config. setup-app-box.sh writes the live /etc/caddy/caddy.json (substituting ADMIN_EMAIL / CONTROL_PLANE_PORT). The control plane appends/removes routes under apps.http.servers.srv0.routes via the admin API at 127.0.0.1:2019. Replace ADMIN_EMAIL with your ACME contact if using this file directly.
